---
title: "Commercial: Hyperborean ice cream"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

1990 McCool FM - :30 second spot

---

**BLANCHARD:**
Get to da Ice cream! It’s me Blanchard, multiple gold medal winner of multiple winter olympics. 

**BLANCHARD:**
Get gains like me with a delicious frozen treat. Introducing new flavour ranges of  Hyperborean high protein ice cream. Bringing the total amount to 80 to celebrate the new decade. Including Penguin Paradise, Poppy hopscotch, and Peanut persuasion. 

**BLANCHARD:**
And remember kids, it's not just adults who can get swole.
